description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: pre:start, pre:deploy, and pre:finish. Add a pre:prepare job in the pre:start stage that runs the shell command bundle exec rake 'pre:prepare', stores a dotenv artifact build.env, and runs only when the pipeline source is schedule or web and the PRE_DEPLOY variable equals "true". Add a pre:deploy job in the pre:deploy stage that needs pre:prepare, triggers the project gitlab-com/gl-infra/deployer with strategy depend, sets DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT=pre, DEPLOY_USER=deployer, DEPLOY_VERSION=$DEPLOY_VERSION, SKIP_PIPELINE_NOTIFY='true', TRIGGER_REF=master, and uses the same schedule/web and PRE_DEPLOY condition. Add pre:notify_start, pre:notify_failed, and pre:notify_success jobs that extend .pre_notify_base (which allows failure, includes .with-bundle and .common-ci-tokens), run the command bundle exec rake 'pre:notify', have appropriate needs (pre:prepare and optionally pre:deploy), belong to stages pre:start or pre:finish, and execute on_success or on_failure as specified. Finally, add a pre:release_note job in pre:finish that needs pre:prepare and pre:deploy, runs bundle exec rake 'pre:release_note' on_success, and also inherits .pre_notify_base and .common-ci-tokens.
